Hey guys, I'm going to talk about some frequently asked questions for the awesome product, Burn AM. First question, how much should I take? There is only a need to take one serving every day. That is it, no problem. Number two, when should you take it? And daily versus weekly and other undulating dosages. You should take it in the morning, as per the suggestion in the name. So first thing, when you wake up, take it with a bunch of water. Okay, again, that leads into the next question, how? With food, with water. So this is where it does take a little bit of experimentation on your end. So I would start out taking it with quite a bit of water when you wake up and then see what happens if you take it fasted. So see if you have any GI upset or not. And if it does give you a little rumbly in the tumbling, then just go ahead and take it with your first meal. So that's easy as that, no problem. Question number four, should you stop it? How do you start it? And do you have to cycle it? You can take this product every day indefinitely, no problems. There are no, there's no caffeine in this product, so you don't have to worry about building a tolerance to anything at all. You can take this indefinitely. Question number five, what happens if you skip? Do not double dose for this product. If you want to make your life more complicated, you can split the next dose over a three day period because there is three capsules in a serving and you can take four capsules for the next three days to make up that difference if you want to make your life complicated. But just hop back on the wagon and take a normal serving the next day. It's fine.
